title: 2 x 151 Super Glue Tubes 1g 5pk, Extra Strong Non-Drip Formula for Household Repairs
features: MULTI-PACK VALUE: Contains 5 individual tubes of 1g super glue, perfect for keeping spares or using in different locations around the home
VERSATILE BONDING: Effectively bonds ceramics, rubber, wood, most plastics, fine china, aluminium, jewellery and numerous other household items
PRECISION APPLICATION: Non-drip formula ensures controlled dispensing and precise application without messy spills or waste
EXTRA STRONG: Features an enhanced bonding formula that creates powerful, durable adhesion between surfaces
QUICK-ACTING: Forms strong bonds within seconds, making it ideal for swift household repairs and DIY projects
description: 151 Super Glue's extra-strong 5-pack brings professional-grade bonding power to your household repairs. Each pack contains five 1g tubes of non-drip formula, perfect for precise application without mess. Ideal for fixing ceramics, rubber, wood, most plastics, fine china, aluminium, jewellery, and numerous other household items. The convenient single-use tubes ensure the adhesive stays fresh and ready when you need it. These tubes feature a precision applicator tip for controlled dispensing, making detailed repair work easier. The fast-acting formula creates strong, durable bonds within seconds. The compact packaging makes it easy to store in your toolbox or drawer for emergency repairs. Note: As this is a powerful adhesive, please read all instructions carefully before use and exercise caution during application, as it bonds skin and eyes in seconds.
